policy: This file is the monotonic staged baseline for compiler/lint strictness that cannot be enabled without touching production code outside Task 14 ownership. Counts may only decrease. New production files are not exempt.

baselines.evidence: 2026-06-20 build probe found implicit any debt in untyped third-party nodemailer and array literals outside Task 14 ownership.
2026-06-20 build probe found existing Fastify route handlers and middleware with reply-send branches that do not return a value consistently.
2026-06-20 tsc probe with strictNullChecks/noUnused flags found nullable TypeORM query and credential-shape defects across payment, analytics, GDPR, reorder, notification, and route code.
2026-06-20 lint/tsc probe found pre-existing unused Relation imports and a small number of unused route/service parameters.
